overview: Arjun College of Technology and Science is an autonomous engineering college sponsored by Brilliant Bells Educational Society near Ramoji Film City on the Hyderabad-Vijayawada highway. The official site describes a 10-acre green campus focused on academic delivery, employability, and personality development.
accreditation: Autonomous institution; AICTE approved; affiliated to JNTUH; the official college page notes a JNTUH 'A' rating and TASK star status.

coursesAndFees.program: B.Tech - CSE, CSE (AI and ML), ECE

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: Fee not published on current public pages
Fee not published on current public pages
Fee not published on current public pages

admissions.admissionProcess: B.Tech admissions align with TG EAPCET-based counseling for eligible candidates, while the college also accepts direct enquiries for management and other institutional admissions through its contact channels.
admissions.importantDates: TG EAPCET and TG ECET schedules are published by Telangana authorities each admission cycle; Arjun shares direct admission guidance through its website and contact team.

facilities: Solar hot-water facility for hostel students
campus.specialNote: The college emphasizes TASK-linked skill development and in-house placement preparation alongside its scenic Mount Opera campus setting.

contact.address: Sy.No. 376/7, Batasingaram (V), Abdullapur Mettu (M), R.R. District - 501512, Telangana, India
